'''âm-t-ng''' ('''kamatang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hench|hench]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hench|hench]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-t-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kamatang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimatang|thimatang]] || [[word:jimatang|jimatang]] || [[word:shimatang|shimatang]] || [[word:kimatang|kimatang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumatang|thuthumatang]] || [[word:jujumatang|jujumatang]] || [[word:shushumatang|shushumatang]] || [[word:kukumatang|kukumatang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumatang|thumatang]] || [[word:jumatang|jumatang]] || [[word:shumatang|shumatang]] || [[word:kumatang|kumatang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumatang|thumatang]] || [[word:jumatang|jumatang]] || [[word:shumatang|shumatang]] || [[word:kumatang|kumatang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thematang|thematang]] || [[word:jematang|jematang]] || [[word:shematang|shematang]] || [[word:kematang|kematang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomatang|thothomatang]] || [[word:jojomatang|jojomatang]] || [[word:shoshomatang|shoshomatang]] || [[word:kokomatang|kokomatang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomatang|thomatang]] || [[word:jomatang|jomatang]] || [[word:shomatang|shomatang]] || [[word:komatang|komatang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomatang|thomatang]] || [[word:jomatang|jomatang]] || [[word:shomatang|shomatang]] || [[word:komatang|komatang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmatang|thĂŠmatang]] || [[word:jĂŠmatang|jĂŠmatang]] || [[word:shĂŠmatang|shĂŠmatang]] || [[word:kĂŠmatang|kĂŠmatang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamatang|thathamatang]] || [[word:jajamatang|jajamatang]] || [[word:shashamatang|shashamatang]] || [[word:kakamatang|kakamatang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamatang|thamatang]] || [[word:jamatang|jamatang]] || [[word:shamatang|shamatang]] || [[word:kamatang|kamatang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamatang|thamatang]] || [[word:jamatang|jamatang]] || [[word:shamatang|shamatang]] || [[word:kamatang|kamatang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamatang|shamatang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamatang|goshamatang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamatang|gokishamatang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamatangnĂŒ|shamatangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamatangnknĂŒ|goshamatangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamatangnĂŒ|gokishamatangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamatangshĂ«|shamatangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamatangnkshĂ«|goshamatangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamatangshĂ«|gokishamatangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamatangro|shamatangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamatangnkro|goshamatangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamatangro|gokishamatangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamatangmu|shamatangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamatangnkmu|goshamatangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamatangmu|gokishamatangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamatangsher|shamatangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamatangnksher|goshamatangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamatangsher|gokishamatangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamatang|shamatang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamatangnkng|goshamatangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamatang|gokishamatang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamatangya|shamatangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamatangnkya|goshamatangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamatangya|gokishamatangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamatangyam|shamatangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamatangnkyam|goshamatangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamatangyam|gokishamatangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamatangnĂŒshĂ«|shamatangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamatangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshamatangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamatangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishamatangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamatangnĂŒro|shamatangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamatangnknĂŒro|goshamatangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamatangnĂŒro|gokishamatangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamatangnĂŒmu|shamatangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamatangnknĂŒmu|goshamatangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamatangnĂŒmu|gokishamatangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamatangshĂ«nĂŒ|shamatangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamatangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamatangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamatangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamatangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamatangshĂ«ro|shamatangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamatangnkshĂ«ro|goshamatangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamatangshĂ«ro|gokishamatangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamatangshĂ«mu|shamatangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamatangnkshĂ«mu|goshamatangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamatangshĂ«mu|gokishamatangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamatangronĂŒ|shamatangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamatangnkronĂŒ|goshamatangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamatangronĂŒ|gokishamatangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamatangroshĂ«|shamatangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamatangnkroshĂ«|goshamatangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamatangroshĂ«|gokishamatangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamatangromu|shamatangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamatangnkromu|goshamatangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamatangromu|gokishamatangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamatangmunĂŒ|shamatangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamatangnkmunĂŒ|goshamatangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamatangmunĂŒ|gokishamatangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamatangmushĂ«|shamatangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamatangnkmushĂ«|goshamatangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamatangmushĂ«|gokishamatangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamatangmuro|shamatangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamatangnkmuro|goshamatangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamatangmuro|gokishamatangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
